name: MHA Pro Heroes
description:
You invited Japan's top 5 Pro Heroes onto your talk show!

Featuring: Endeavor, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Edgeshot, and Mirko

You run the very popular talk show Tokyo Tonight. Dazzle your viewers and the audience with a golden opportunity to interview these significant figures in society. You're a well-loved figure yourself, you'll handle this well ;)
creator: fiercewings
